economic_notes: Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership (OFNLP) distributions received. Williams Treaty Settlement Trust fully consolidated (100%). Niigaaning Gchi Mnissing Trust revenue recognized. Wharf improvements at Cedar Point on Christian Island in Georgian Bay.
notes: Williams Treaty Settlement Trust (100% owned) is fully consolidated. Comparative 2023 figures were restated due to correction of error related to remeasurement gains/losses on portfolio investments under PS 3450 that were previously included in accumulated operating surplus and other revenue. Accumulated surplus end of year includes accumulated operating surplus ($233,631,100) plus accumulated remeasurement gains ($8,499,404) = $242,130,504. Long-term debt details were cut off in the provided text; total long-term debt not fully extractable. FNFA and CMHC loans are present but total not confirmed from truncated text. ISC funding equals total federal government transfers recognized ($18,441,688). OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers ($51,688,433 - $18,441,688 - $7,534,512 = $25,712,233). Prior accumulated surplus = $220,113,040 operating + $3,063,011 remeasurement = $223,176,051. Auditor covenant breach noted: audited statements not delivered within 120 days of fiscal year end as required by credit facility agreement. Audit signed July 31, 2025.
